planner.description: breaks any goal into tiny next steps

memory-coach.description: gives one ADHD-friendly reframe or trick

demo-echo.description: test agent that echoes what you send it

ops.description: ops agent (example remote agent - move to VPS)

bookkeeper.description: manages the user's memory: remember things, recall schedule, mark tasks done or deferred

browser.description: looks things up on the web and reports back

orchestrator.description: the manager: routes work across the network, runs build tasks end-to-end (context -> PRD -> builder), owns the org chart and task ledger

builder.description: builds NEW agents on demand (its own Hermes brain + /ask service + registry entry); makes the network auto-expandable

repair.description: diagnoses and fixes anything broken in the network; reads the failure log (local RAG), restarts dead agents, recreates the stealth browser
